name: Alexstrasza
description: A Healer who shares her Health with allies and can transform into a Dragon to empower her Abilities.
title: The Life-Binder
info: Alexstrasza, the queen of dragons, was empowered by the titans to be the guardian of all life on Azeroth. She has aided mortals time and again, even at great personal cost. Now, she soars across the Nexus, protecting life wherever she finds it.

Alexstrasza.name: Gift of Life
Alexstrasza.description: Sacrifice 15% of Alexstrasza's current Health, healing an allied Hero for 150% of that amount.  Passive: Increase Alexstrasza's Health regeneration by 150%.  Dragonqueen: Breath of Life Cooldown greatly reduced and does not cost Health.

Alexstrasza.name: Abundance
Alexstrasza.description: Plant a seed of healing that blooms after 3 seconds, healing nearby allied Heroes for 20% of their maximum Health.  Dragonqueen: Preservation Heal area and amount greatly increased.

Alexstrasza.name: Flame Buffet
Alexstrasza.description: Launch a fireball, Burning enemies hit for 75 (+4% per level) damage over 5.5 seconds.  Hitting enemies that are already Burning deals 125 (+4% per level) bonus damage upon impact, Slows them by 40% decaying over 2 seconds, and refunds the Mana cost.  Dragonqueen: Wing Buffet Damage and Knockback enemies in an arc.

Alexstrasza.name: Life-Binder
Alexstrasza.description: Bind Alexstrasza's life force with an allied Hero. Both her and her target are healed for 480 (+4% per level) Health over 2 seconds. Afterwards, the Hero with a lower percentage of Health is healed to the same Health percentage as the other Hero.  Dragonqueen: Cast range increased by 45%.

Alexstrasza.name: Cleansing Flame
Alexstrasza.description: After 1.25 seconds, take to the sky and drop 5 fireballs over 6 seconds at the position of the mouse cursor. Fireballs deal 135 (+4% per level) damage to enemies and heal allied Heroes for 300 (+4% per level) Health.  2 seconds after dropping all fireballs, Alexstrasza lands at the position of the mouse cursor.

Alexstrasza.name: Dragonqueen
Alexstrasza.description: After 1.25 seconds, transform into a dragon and gain 500 (+4% per level) Health.  While Dragonqueen is active, Alexstrasza's Abilities are empowered, and her Basic Attacks deal 143 (+4% per level) damage and heal allied Heroes for 43 (+4% per level) in an arc in front of her. Additionally, the duration of incoming Stuns, Roots, and Slows, is reduced by 50%.  Lasts 15 seconds.

AlexstraszaDragon.name: Breath of Life
AlexstraszaDragon.description: Heal an allied Hero for 20% of Alexstrasza's current Health.

AlexstraszaDragon.name: Preservation
AlexstraszaDragon.description: Plant a seed of healing that blooms after 3 seconds, healing nearby allied Heroes for 30% of their maximum Health.

AlexstraszaDragon.name: Wing Buffet
AlexstraszaDragon.description: Deal 150 (+4% per level) damage to enemies in an area, knocking them back and Slowing them by 50% for 3 seconds.

AlexstraszaDragon.name: Dragonqueen
AlexstraszaDragon.description: Alexstrasza has transformed into a powerful dragon aspect, gaining 500 (+4% per level) Health, resistance to disabling effects, and empowered Basic Attacks and Abilities.

AlexstraszaDragon.name: Cleansing Flame
AlexstraszaDragon.description: Take to the sky and drop 5 fireballs over 6 seconds at the position of the mouse cursor. Fireballs deal 135 (+4% per level) damage to enemies and heal allied Heroes for 300 (+4% per level) Health.  2 seconds after dropping all fireballs, Alexstrasza lands at the position of the mouse cursor.

1.name: Live and Let Live
1.description: While Alexstrasza is above 75% Health, Gift of Life's cooldown recharges 125% faster.

1.name: Circle of Life
1.description: Quest: Collect Regeneration Globes.  Reward: After collecting 10 Regeneration Globes, Abundance heals for an additional 5% maximum Health.  Reward: After collecting 15 Regeneration Globes, Abundance's healing burst creates a Regeneration Globe.

1.name: Flames of Fury
1.description: Reduce the Mana cost of Flame Buffet from 50 to 40.  Quest: Hit 20 Burning Heroes with Flame Buffet.  Reward: Hitting a Burning Hero with Flame Buffet reduces Dragonqueen's cooldown by 5 seconds.

4.name: Surge of Vitality
4.description: Abundance's healing burst grants allied Heroes 30% Movement Speed for 3 seconds.

4.name: Heat Exhaustion
4.description: Increase Flame Buffet's Slow from 40% to 50% and cause it to no longer decay.

4.name: Exuberance
4.description: While above 75% Health, gain 15% Movement Speed.

7.name: Lifeblossom
7.description: While Alexstrasza is above 75% Health, Gift of Life creates a Lifeblossom at the target's location. Alexstrasza can collect the Lifeblossom to make her next Gift of Life cost no Health.  Passive: Reduces the cost of Gift of Life to 10% of Alexstrasza's current Health.

7.name: Verdant Flourish
7.description: Alexstrasza receives 40% more healing from Abundance and 100% more healing from Regeneration Globes.

7.name: Fire Within
7.description: Hitting a Burning Hero with Flame Buffet heals Alexstrasza for 10% of her maximum Health.

10.name: Life-Binder
10.description: Bind Alexstrasza's life force with an allied Hero. Both her and her target are healed for 480 (+4% per level) Health over 2 seconds. Afterwards, the Hero with a lower percentage of Health is healed to the same Health percentage as the other Hero.  Dragonqueen: Cast range increased by 45%.

10.name: Cleansing Flame
10.description: After 1.25 seconds, take to the sky and drop 5 fireballs over 6 seconds at the position of the mouse cursor. Fireballs deal 135 (+4% per level) damage to enemies and heal allied Heroes for 300 (+4% per level) Health.  2 seconds after dropping all fireballs, Alexstrasza lands at the position of the mouse cursor.

13.name: Dragon Scales
13.description: Gain 50 Armor while Stunned, Rooted, or Silenced, and for 2 seconds after. Can only trigger once every 10 seconds.

13.name: Pacify
13.description: Activate to Slow and reduce an enemy Hero's damage by 50% for 3 seconds.  Healing a Stunned, Rooted, or Silenced ally reduces Pacify's cooldown by 30 seconds.

13.name: Life Unbound
13.description: Activate to heal an allied Hero for 15% of their maximum Health and deal 200 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies.  Healing a Stunned, Rooted, or Silenced ally reduces Life Unbound's cooldown by 30 seconds.  Cannot be used on Alexstrasza.

16.name: Tough Love
16.description: Gift of Life grants its target 10 Armor for 2.5 seconds, increased to 30 while Alexstrasza is above 75% Health.

16.name: Overprotective
16.description: Heroes healed by Abundance gain a Shield for 6 seconds equal to 70% of the amount healed.

16.name: Draconic Discipline
16.description: Increase Dragonqueen's duration by 6 seconds, and Basic Attack healing by 50%.

20.name: On Ruby Wings
20.description: Healing or damaging Heroes 8 or more times with Cleansing Flame activates Dragonqueen for 15 seconds upon landing.

20.name: Ancient Flame
20.description: While Dragonqueen is active, Alexstrasza's Basic Attacks apply Flame Buffet.

20.name: Blessing of the Red
20.description: Activate to grant an allied Hero 500 bonus maximum Health until they die.  Cannot be used on Alexstrasza, or on a Hero who already has Blessing of the Red.

tooltipMarkup.AlexstraszaAbundance: Plant a seed of healing that blooms after <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(Effect,AlexstraszaAbundanceCreatePersistent,PeriodCount) * Effect,AlexstraszaAbundanceCreatePersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]" precision="2"/></c> seconds, healing nearby allied Heroes for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100 * Effect,AlexstraszaAbundanceCreateHealer,RechargeVitalFraction" player="0"/>%</c> of their maximum Health.<n/><n/><c val="#ColorViolet">Dragonqueen: Preservation</c><n/>Heal area and amount greatly increased.
tooltipMarkup.AlexstraszaAncientFlameFlameBuffet: While Dragonqueen is active, Alexstrasza's Basic Attacks apply Flame Buffet.
tooltipMarkup.AlexstraszaBlessingOfTheRed: Activate to grant an allied Hero <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,AlexstraszaBlessingOfTheRed,Modification.VitalMaxArray[Life]"/></c> bonus maximum Health until they die.<n/><n/>Cannot be used on Alexstrasza, or on a Hero who already has Blessing of the Red.
tooltipMarkup.AlexstraszaBreathOfLife: Heal an allied Hero for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,AlexstraszaBreathOfLifeHealAccumulator,Ratio"/>%</c> of Alexstrasza's current Health.
tooltipMarkup.AlexstraszaCircleOfLifeAbundance: Quest: Collect Regeneration Globes.Reward: After collecting Regeneration Globes, Abundance heals for an additional % maximum Health.Reward: After collecting Regeneration Globes, Abundance's healing burst creates a Regeneration Globe.

Fireballs deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,AlexstraszaCleansingFlameFireballDamage,Amount * Effect,AlexstraszaCleansingFlameFireballSearchPersistent,PeriodCount"/></c> damage to enemies and heal allied Heroes for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,AlexstraszaCleansingFlameFireballCreateHealer,RechargeVitalRate * Effect,AlexstraszaCleansingFlameFireballSearchPersistent,PeriodCount"/></c> Health.<n/><n/><c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,AlexstraszaCleansingFlameFireballPersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[7]" precision="1"/></c> seconds after dropping all fireballs, Alexstrasza lands at the position of the mouse cursor.

Fireballs deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,AlexstraszaCleansingFlameFireballDamage,Amount * Effect,AlexstraszaCleansingFlameFireballSearchPersistent,PeriodCount"/></c> damage to enemies and heal allied Heroes for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,AlexstraszaCleansingFlameFireballCreateHealer,RechargeVitalRate * Effect,AlexstraszaCleansingFlameFireballSearchPersistent,PeriodCount"/></c> Health.<n/><n/><c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,AlexstraszaCleansingFlameFireballPersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[7]" precision="1"/></c> seconds after dropping all fireballs, Alexstrasza lands at the position of the mouse cursor.

Can only trigger once every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,AlexstraszaDragonScales,Cost.Cooldown.TimeUse"/></c> seconds.

Additionally, the duration of incoming Stuns, Roots, and Slows, is reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>.<n/><n/>Lasts <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,AlexstraszaDragonqueen,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.AlexstraszaDragonqueenDragonFormPassive: Alexstrasza has transformed into a powerful dragon aspect, gaining <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,AlexstraszaDragonqueenHealthIncrease,Modification.VitalMaxArray[0]"/></c> Health, resistance to disabling effects, and empowered Basic Attacks and Abilities.
tooltipMarkup.AlexstraszaExuberance: While above <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100 * Validator,AlexstraszaCasterHealthThreshold,Value"/>%</c> Health, gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100 * Behavior,AlexstraszaExuberance,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> Movement Speed.
tooltipMarkup.AlexstraszaFireWithinFlameBuffet: Hitting a Burning Hero with Flame Buffet heals Alexstrasza for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100 * Effect,AlexstraszaFireWithinFlameBuffetCreateHealer,RechargeVitalFraction"/>%</c> of her maximum Health.
tooltipMarkup.AlexstraszaFlameBuffet: Launch a fireball, Burning enemies hit for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,AlexstraszaFlameBuffetDoTDamage,Amount*(1+Behavior,AlexstraszaFlameBuffetDoT,PeriodCount)"/></c> damage over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,AlexstraszaFlameBuffetDoT,Duration" player="0" precision="1"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/>Hitting enemies that are already Burning deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,AlexstraszaFlameBuffetImpactBonusDamage,Amount"/></c> bonus damage upon impact, Slows them by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,AlexstraszaFlameBuffetSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100" player="0"/>%</c> decaying over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,AlexstraszaFlameBuffetSlow,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds, and refunds the Mana cost.<n/><n/><c val="#ColorViolet">Dragonqueen: Wing Buffet</c><n/>Damage and Knockback enemies in an arc.
tooltipMarkup.AlexstraszaFlamesOfFuryFlameBuffet: Reduce the Mana cost of Flame Buffet from to .Quest: Hit Burning Heroes with Flame Buffet.Reward: Hitting a Burning Hero with Flame Buffet reduces Dragonqueen's cooldown by seconds.
tooltipMarkup.AlexstraszaGiftOfLife: Sacrifice <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Accumulator,AlexstraszaGiftOfLifeCostAccumulator,Ratio" player="0"/>%</c> of Alexstrasza's current Health, healing an allied Hero for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100 * (Accumulator,AlexstraszaGiftOfLifeHealAccumulator,Ratio / Accumulator,AlexstraszaGiftOfLifeCostAccumulator,Ratio)" player="0"/>%</c> of that amount.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Increase Alexstrasza's Health regeneration by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">150%</c>.<n/><n/><c val="#ColorViolet">Dragonqueen: Breath of Life</c><n/>Cooldown greatly reduced and does not cost Health.
tooltipMarkup.AlexstraszaHeatExhaustionFlameBuffet: Increase Flame Buffet's Slow from <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,AlexstraszaFlameBuffetSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100" player="0"/>%</c> to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,AlexstraszaFlameBuffetHeatExhaustionSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100"/>%</c> and cause it to no longer decay.
tooltipMarkup.AlexstraszaLifeUnbound: Activate to heal an allied Hero for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100 * Effect,AlexstraszaLifeUnboundCreateHealer,RechargeVitalFraction"/>%</c> of their maximum Health and deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,AlexstraszaLifeUnboundDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to nearby enemies.<n/><n/>Healing a Stunned, Rooted, or Silenced ally reduces Life Unbound's cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-1 * Effect,AlexstraszaLifeUnboundModifyCooldownHealed,Cost.Cooldown.TimeUse"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">Cannot be used on Alexstrasza.</c>
tooltipMarkup.AlexstraszaLifebinder: Bind Alexstrasza's life force with an allied Hero. Both her and her target are healed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,AlexstraszaLifebinderHoTTarget,RechargeVitalRate*Behavior,AlexstraszaLifebinderHoTControllerTarget,PeriodCount"/></c> Health over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,AlexstraszaLifebinderTargetBehavior,Period" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds. Afterwards, the Hero with a lower percentage of Health is healed to the same Health percentage as the other Hero.<n/><n/><c val="#ColorViolet">Dragonqueen:</c> Cast range increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="((Effect,AlexstraszaDragonqueenLifebinderRangeIncrease,CatalogModifications[0].Value-Abil,AlexstraszaLifebinder,Range)/Abil,AlexstraszaLifebinder,Range)*100" player="0"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.AlexstraszaLifeblossomeGiftOfLife: While Alexstrasza is above <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100 * Validator,AlexstraszaCasterHealthThreshold,Value"/>%</c> Health, Gift of Life creates a Lifeblossom at the target's location. Alexstrasza can collect the Lifeblossom to make her next Gift of Life cost no Health.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Reduces the cost of Gift of Life to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> of Alexstrasza's current Health.
tooltipMarkup.AlexstraszaLiveAndLetLiveGiftOfLife: While Alexstrasza is above <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100 * Validator,AlexstraszaCasterHealthThreshold,Value"/>%</c> Health, Gift of Life's cooldown recharges <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100 * Effect,AlexstraszaLiveAndLetLiveGiftOfLifeModifyCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse / Behavior,AlexstraszaLiveAndLetLiveGiftOfLife,Period" precision="2"/>%</c> faster.
tooltipMarkup.AlexstraszaOnRubyWingsCleansingFlame: Healing or damaging Heroes <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,AlexstraszaOnRubyWingsCleansingFlameTokenCounter,Max"/></c> or more times with Cleansing Flame activates Dragonqueen for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,AlexstraszaOnRubyWingsCleansingFlameExtendDragonqueenBehavior,Value"/></c> seconds upon landing.
tooltipMarkup.AlexstraszaOverprotectiveAbundance: Heroes healed by Abundance gain a Shield for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,AlexstraszaOverprotectiveAbundance,Duration"/></c> seconds equal to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100 * Effect,AlexstraszaOverprotectiveAbundanceShieldFractionScaleDummy,VitalArray[Shields].ChangeFraction"/>%</c> of the amount healed.
tooltipMarkup.AlexstraszaPacify: Activate to Slow and reduce an enemy Hero's damage by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100 * Behavior,AlexstraszaPacifyDamageReduction,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Ability]"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,AlexstraszaPacifyDamageReduction,Duration"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/>Healing a Stunned, Rooted, or Silenced ally reduces Pacify's cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-1 * Effect,AlexstraszaPacifyModifyCooldownHealed,Cost.Cooldown.TimeUse"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.AlexstraszaPreservation: Plant a seed of healing that blooms after <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(Effect,AlexstraszaAbundanceCreatePersistent,PeriodCount) * Effect,AlexstraszaAbundanceCreatePersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]" precision="2"/></c> seconds, healing nearby allied Heroes for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100 * Effect,AlexstraszaPreservationCreateHealer,RechargeVitalFraction" player="0"/>%</c> of their maximum Health.
tooltipMarkup.AlexstraszaRitualOfLifeLifebinder: Life-Binder activates <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(Behavior,AlexstraszaLifebinderTargetBehavior,Duration + Talent,AlexstraszaRitualOfLife,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value) / Behavior,AlexstraszaLifebinderTargetBehavior,Period" player="0"/></c> times over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,AlexstraszaLifebinderTargetBehavior,Duration + Talent,AlexstraszaRitualOfLife,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.AlexstraszaSurgeOfVitalityAbundance: Abundance's healing burst grants allied Heroes <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100 * Behavior,AlexstraszaSurgeOfVitalityAbundance,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,AlexstraszaSurgeOfVitalityAbundance,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.AlexstraszaToughLoveGiftOfLife: Gift of Life grants its target <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,AlexstraszaToughLoveGiftOfLifeNoBonus,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> Armor for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,AlexstraszaToughLoveGiftOfLife,Duration" precision="2"/></c> seconds, increased to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,AlexstraszaToughLoveGiftOfLife,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> while Alexstrasza is above <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100 * Validator,AlexstraszaCasterHealthThreshold,Value"/>%</c> Health.
tooltipMarkup.AlexstraszaVerdantFlourishAbundance: Alexstrasza receives <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100 * Effect,AlexstraszaAbundanceCreateHealer,MultiplicativeModifierArray[0].Modifier"/>%</c> more healing from Abundance and <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100 * (Talent,AlexstraszaVerdantFlourishAbundance,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value - 1)"/>%</c> more healing from Regeneration Globes.
tooltipMarkup.AlexstraszaWingBuffet: Deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,AlexstraszaWingBuffetDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to enemies in an area, knocking them back and Slowing them by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100 * Behavior,AlexstraszaWingBuffetSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor" precision="2"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,AlexstraszaWingBuffetSlow,Duration" precision="2"/></c> seconds.
